description.zh: Plot Reads coverage distribution on chromosomes (differentiating strands).
description.en: Plot Reads coverage distribution on chromosomes (differentiating strands).

description.zh: DataFrame containing bin statistics. Required columns: chrom, pos (bin start), counts_pos, counts_neg.
description.en: DataFrame containing bin statistics. Required columns: chrom, pos (bin start), counts_pos, counts_neg.

description.zh: Column name for positive strand reads count.
description.en: Column name for positive strand reads count.

description.zh: Column name for negative strand reads count.
description.en: Column name for negative strand reads count.

description.zh: Maximum number of chromosomes to display (after sorting by length or name).
description.en: Maximum number of chromosomes to display (after sorting by length or name).

description.zh: Bin size (used for X-axis unit conversion or annotation).
description.en: Bin size (used for X-axis unit conversion or annotation).
